diagram_title: Compose MCP Tool Result Into LLM-Visible Presentation

activities.title: Normalize Raw Tool Result
activities.description: raw MCP result → McpToolResult {content[], structuredContent?, metadata?, isError?}

activities.title: Partition Content Channels
activities.description: split content[] into text parts vs media/resource attachments

activities.title: Detect Empty Shell Output
activities.description: judge whether joined text is empty / placeholder while structuredContent holds substance

activities.title: Backfill Structured Content
activities.description: serialize structuredContent into visible output when shell detected, stamp observability

activities.title: Truncate Visible Output
activities.description: apply token budget to merged visible text, emit outputPath when truncated
